name: team-project-memory
description: Shared project memory and team knowledge base for AI coding agents

interface.shortDescription: Shared project memory for AI agent teams
interface.longDescription: Skill-first, git-backed project memory for teams using AI coding agents. Captures solved bugs, failed attempts, debugging paths, confidence, and next-reuse instructions without overriding repo-local instructions.
defaultPrompt: Use Team Project Memory to capture solved bugs and reusable team learnings.
Reuse prior debugging paths across Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Devin, and Cline.
